name: per_player_catchable_deep_target
expected_query: with "td8347f6b54d97e2ef3da9e229f2571cb" as (select "nfl_plays"."trg_pid" as "pid", SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rate_type_total_count from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."dot" between 20 and 99 and "nfl_plays"."catchable_ball" = true group by "nfl_plays"."trg_pid"), "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8" as (select COALESCE(trg_pid) as pid, SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as trg_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."nfl_week_id" in ('2023_PRE_WEEK_1', '2023_PRE_WEEK_2', '2023_PRE_WEEK_3', '2023_PRE_WEEK_4', '2023_REG_WEEK_1', '2023_REG_WEEK_2', '2023_REG_WEEK_3', '2023_REG_WEEK_4', '2023_REG_WEEK_5', '2023_REG_WEEK_6', '2023_REG_WEEK_7', '2023_REG_WEEK_8', '2023_REG_WEEK_9', '2023_REG_WEEK_10', '2023_REG_WEEK_11', '2023_REG_WEEK_12', '2023_REG_WEEK_13', '2023_REG_WEEK_14', '2023_REG_WEEK_15', '2023_REG_WEEK_16', '2023_REG_WEEK_17', '2023_REG_WEEK_18', '2023_REG_WEEK_19', '2023_REG_WEEK_20', '2023_REG_WEEK_21', '2023_POST_WEEK_1', '2023_POST_WEEK_2', '2023_POST_WEEK_3', '2023_POST_WEEK_4') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) group by COALESCE(trg_pid)) select "player"."pid", CAST(t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8.trg_from_plays AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(td8347f6b54d97e2ef3da9e229f2571cb.rate_type_total_count AS DECIMAL), 0) AS "trg_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" left join "td8347f6b54d97e2ef3da9e229f2571cb" on "td8347f6b54d97e2ef3da9e229f2571cb"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8" on "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."pid" = "player"."pid" group by "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."trg_from_plays", td8347f6b54d97e2ef3da9e229f2571cb.rate_type_total_count, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
